title: Micromorphological Thin Section Manufacture
author: Lucia Leierer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yh8ft9w
materials: Uniprec ATA Brilliant-220 precision cutting machine

steps.title: Oven drying of intact sediment blocks...
steps.instruction: Oven drying of intact sediment blocks at 60 °C for 48:00:00

steps.title: Impregnating of sample with a 7:3:0
steps.instruction: Impregnating of sample with a 7:3:0.1 ratio of a mixture of of polyester resin (Palatal strained resin UN1866, TNK composites), styrene (Styrene monomer (CAS: 100-42-5) UN2055, TNK composites) and a catalyzer (Methyl-ethyl-ketone (Luperox, CAS: 78-93-3), TNK composites)

steps.title: After hardening, cutting of the blocks...
steps.instruction: After hardening, cutting of the blocks into 1 cm-thick slabs using a Euro-Shatal M31100 radial saw

steps.title: Glueing onto 9 cm x 6 cm glass slides
steps.instruction: Glueing onto 9 cm x 6 cm glass slides

steps.title: Trimming to 1mm thickness using a...
steps.instruction: Trimming to 1mm thickness using a Uniprec ATA Brilliant-220 precision cutting machine

steps.title: Grinding to 30 µm thickness using...
steps.instruction: Grinding to 30 µm thickness using a G&N MPS-RC-Geology grinding machine
